prose:
Method–provenance statement
• Property: frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO energy gap, in electron-volts (eV).
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals (density fitting OFF).
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates (formaldehyde.xyz at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/); single-point calculation on this fixed geometry — notation B3LYP/def2-TZVP//input geometry (no relaxation performed).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
• Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet).
• Software/backend: PySCF (via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill).
• Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 8 cycles; integrity.trustworthy = true; no warnings reported by chemkit.
• Live log: calculation output was streamed in real time to an automatically generated frontier_<timestamp>.out file in the working directory, available for inspection (contains full SCF and orbital details).

Key frontier-orbital energies (eV):
  HOMO-2  = –12.486938
  HOMO-1  = –11.002498
  HOMO    = –7.6523067
  LUMO    = –1.7826355
  LUMO+1  =  1.3920007
  LUMO+2  =  2.8396981

Headline result – HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.869671192773015 eV (gas phase, B3LYP/def2-TZVP).
